rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §21.044 governs educator preparation and certification requirements. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not intersect.
quote: Sec. 21.044. EDUCATOR PREPARATION. (a) The board shall propose rules:
_note: No conflict exists; the rule text concerns educator preparation and has no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
